sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Adversaries may attempt to get a listing of services running on remote hosts, including those that may be vulnerable to remote software exploitation

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Creation of an Executable by an Executable
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the creation of an executable by another executable

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO DYNAMIC_DNS Query to Abused Domain *.mooo.com
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ET INFO DYNAMIC_DNS Query to Abused Domain *.mooo.com"; threshold: type limit, count 1, track by_src, seconds 300; dns.query; content:".mooo.com"; nocase; endswith; classtype:misc-activity; sid:2015633; rev:5; metadata:created_at 2012_08_16, updated_at 2020_09_15;)
